As mentioned in the Chan's MRTP, since the indirect method is bounded in the depth range, it may not be suitable approximation of the SVM solution before the winsorization. Using indirect_policy may lead to an estimate policy shrinking to a certain alue, i.e., policy does not reflect the heterogeneity induced by covariate X.
Thus, we need to stretch the in_direct policy outside the boundary

```{r}
indices_non_depth_boundary <- (indirect_policy_DB!= depth_range[1]) & (indirect_policy_DB!= depth_range[2])

depth_knots <- seq(depth_range[1], depth_range[2], length.out = 10)

phi_lst <- vector("list", length(depth_knots) + 1)
stretch_models <- vector("list", length(depth_knots) + 1)

for(i in 1:length(depth_knots)){
  depth <- depth_knots[i]
  # fine the fitted value at that depth
  phi_lst[[i]] <- sapply(1:nrow(data), function(indice){smoothers_RKHS[[indice]](depth) + krige_values_RKHS[indice]})
  # only use non-boundary value to fit linear model
  stretch_models[[i]] <- lm(phi_lst[[i]][indices_non_depth_boundary] ~ indirect_policy_DB[indices_non_depth_boundary])
}

gps_est <- dnorm(data$logWellDepth, mean = gps_mean_model$SL.predict, sd = gps_sigma)

phi_lst[[length(depth_knots) + 1]] <- (data$logconcentration_plus_median - sapply(1:nrow(data), function(indice){smoothers_RKHS[[indice]](data$logWellDepth[indice]) - krige_values_RKHS[indice]}))/gps_est

stretch_models[[length(depth_knots) + 1]] <- lm(phi_lst[[length(depth_knots) + 1]][indices_non_depth_boundary] ~ indirect_policy_DB[indices_non_depth_boundary])
```

Then, we calculate the stretch value of the policy at the boundary

```{r}
indirect_policy_DB_stretch_lst <- vector("list", length(depth_knots) + 1)

for(i in 1:(length(depth_knots) + 1)){
  intercept <- coef(stretch_models[[i]])[1]
  slope <- coef(stretch_models[[i]])[2]
  indirect_policy_DB_stretch_lst[[i]] <- (phi_lst[[i]] - intercept)/slope
}

indirect_policy_DB_stretch_lst_min <- do.call(pmin, indirect_policy_DB_stretch_lst)
indirect_policy_DB_stretch_lst_max <- do.call(pmax, indirect_policy_DB_stretch_lst)
```

```{r}
indices_depth_lower_boundary <- indirect_policy_DB == depth_range[1]
indices_depth_upper_boundary <- indirect_policy_DB == depth_range[2]
```

```{r}
indirect_policy_DB_stretch <- indirect_policy_DB
indirect_policy_DB_stretch[indices_depth_lower_boundary] <- indirect_policy_DB_stretch_lst_min[indices_depth_lower_boundary]
indirect_policy_DB_stretch[indices_depth_upper_boundary] <- indirect_policy_DB_stretch_lst_max[indices_depth_upper_boundary]
```

```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_DB, indirect_policy_DB_stretch)
plot(1:nrow(data), indirect_policy_DB_stretch)
summary(indirect_policy_DB_stretch)

indirect_policy_DB_stretch <- pmax(-20, indirect_policy_DB_stretch)
hist(indirect_policy_DB_stretch)
```

Let's check the accuracy and mcc for the stretched policy. We found that the stretched policy even improve the performance a little bit.

Also, reverse true/false does not affect the acc/mcc that much, if there is no indirect_policy == data$logWellDepth, I think the result should be the same.

```{r}
Metrics::accuracy(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, indirect_policy_DB > data$logWellDepth)
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor( indirect_policy_DB > data$logWellDepth))
```

```{r}
Metrics::accuracy(log(data$concentration_plus_median) < threshold_val, indirect_policy_DB_stretch < data$logWellDepth)
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data$concentration_plus_median) < threshold_val), estimate = as.factor( indirect_policy_DB_stretch < data$logWellDepth))
```



###### initialze: generalized inverse

Use indirect policy

```{r}
params_coords_initial_ginv <- rep(0, ncol(k_matrix))
params_coords_initial_ginv[1] <- mean(indirect_policy)
# generalized inverse rather than inverse, this is extremely slow 
params_coords_initial_ginv[2:ncol(k_coords_matrix)] <- MASS::ginv(k_coords_matrix[,-1]) %*% (indirect_policy - mean(indirect_policy))
```

```{r}
plot(indirect_policy, as.vector(k_coords_matrix %*% params_coords_initial_ginv), main = "initialize: ginv v.s. indirect")
Metrics::rmse(indirect_policy, as.vector(k_coords_matrix %*% params_coords_initial_ginv))
summary(indirect_policy - as.vector(k_coords_matrix %*%params_coords_initial_ginv))
summary(indirect_policy)
hist(params_coords_initial_ginv, main = "histogram of ginv initialize")
```

Let's check the acc and mcc of the initialized parameter. Why they decreased so much.

```{r}
Metrics::accuracy(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, as.vector(k_coords_matrix %*%params_coords_initial_ginv) > data$logWellDepth)
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor( as.vector(k_coords_matrix %*%params_coords_initial_ginv) > data$logWellDepth))
```

Use indirect policy stretch

```{r}
params_coords_initial_stretch_ginv <- rep(0, ncol(k_coords_matrix))
params_coords_initial_stretch_ginv[1] <- mean(indirect_policy_stretch)
# generalized inverse rather than inverse, this is extremely slow 
params_coords_initial_stretch_ginv[2:ncol(k_coords_matrix)] <- MASS::ginv(k_coords_matrix[,-1]) %*% (indirect_policy_stretch - mean(indirect_policy_stretch))
```

```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_stretch, as.vector(k_coords_matrix %*% params_coords_initial_stretch_ginv), main = "initialize: ginv v.s. indirect")
Metrics::rmse(indirect_policy_stretch, as.vector(k_coords_matrix %*% params_coords_initial_stretch_ginv))
summary(indirect_policy_stretch - as.vector(k_coords_matrix %*%params_coords_initial_stretch_ginv))
summary(indirect_policy_stretch)
hist(params_coords_initial_stretch_ginv, main = "histogram of ginv initialize")
## check accurary and mcc for the initial point
```

```{r}
Metrics::accuracy(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, as.vector(k_coords_matrix %*% params_coords_initial_stretch_ginv) > data$logWellDepth)
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor( as.vector(k_coords_matrix %*% params_coords_initial_stretch_ginv > data$logWellDepth)))
```


###### initialze: cv glmnet

```{r}
initial_cvglmnet <- cv.glmnet(x = k_matrix[,-1], y = indirect_policy_DB, alpha = 0)
params_initial_cvglmet <- coef(initial_cvglmnet)
params_initial_cvglmet <- as.numeric(params_initial_cvglmet)
```

```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_DB, as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_cvglmet), main = "initialize: indirect v.s. indirect DB")
Metrics::rmse(indirect_policy_DB, as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_cvglmet))
summary(indirect_policy_DB - as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_cvglmet))
summary(indirect_policy_DB)
hist(params_initial_cvglmet, main = "histogram of cvglmnet initialize")
```

###### initialze: glmnet 

```{r}
# the original indirect policy
initial_glmnet <- glmnet(x = k_matrix[,-1], y = indirect_policy_DB, alpha = 0, lambda = 0)
params_initial_glmnet <- coef(initial_glmnet)
params_initial_glmnet <- as.numeric(params_initial_glmnet)

# # or the stretched indirect policy
# initial_glmnet <- glmnet(x = k_matrix[,-1], y = indirect_policy_DB_stretch, alpha = 0, lambda = 0)
# params_initial_glmnet <- coef(initial_glmnet)
# params_initial_glmnet <- as.numeric(params_initial_glmnet)
# 
# # it seems like the stretch actually does not help
```

```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_DB, as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_glmnet), main = "initialize: indirect v.s. indirect DB")
Metrics::rmse(indirect_policy_DB, as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_glmnet))
summary(indirect_policy_DB - as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_glmnet))
summary(indirect_policy_DB)
hist(params_initial_glmnet, main = "histogram of cvglmnet initialize")
```


result of cv.glmnet initial

```{r}
print('training')
Metrics::accuracy(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_glmnet)  > data$logWellDepth)
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor(as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_glmnet)  > data$logWellDepth))

print('test')
Metrics::accuracy(log(data_test$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, as.numeric(k_matrix_test%*% params_initial_glmnet  > data_test$logWellDepth))
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data_test$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor(as.vector(k_matrix_test %*% params_initial_glmnet  > data_test$logWellDepth)))
```

```{r}
print('training')
Metrics::accuracy(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_cvglmet)  > data$logWellDepth)
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor(as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_cvglmet)  > data$logWellDepth))

print('test')
Metrics::accuracy(log(data_test$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, as.numeric(k_matrix_test%*% params_initial_cvglmet  > data_test$logWellDepth))
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data_test$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor(as.vector(k_matrix_test %*% params_initial_cvglmet  > data_test$logWellDepth)))
```

##### dc algorithm

```{r}
max_iter <- 50
tol <- 1e-4
clip_epsilon_bar <- 300
clip_epsilon <- 1
kernel_bw <- 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5)
depth_range <- c(min(data$logWellDepth), max(data$logWellDepth))

surrogate_type <- "Gaussian"

# loss_type <- "ipw"
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median
# krige_adjust <- rep(0, nrow(data))

# loss_type <- 'or'
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(svm_auto, newdata = design_matrix) - krige_values_RKHS
# krige_adjust <- krige_values_RKHS

loss_type <- 'db'
resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(svm_auto, newdata = design_matrix) - krige_values_RKHS
krige_adjust <- krige_values_RKHS


gps_est <- dnorm(data$logWellDepth, mean = gps_mean_model$SL.predict, sd = gps_sigma)

params_old <- params_initial_glmnet
params <- params_initial_glmnet

smoothers <- smoothers_RKHS
cumint_smoothers <- cumint_smoothers_RKHS
threshold_val <- log(5)

for (k in 1:max_iter) {
    
    # Solve the convex subproblem
    cat(k,'-th iteration of DC algorithm','\n')
    sub_result <- optim(par = params_old, 
                        fn = compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, 
                        gr = d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, # we try the case with/without gr
                        params_old = params_old, 
                        K = k_matrix, 
                        T = data$logWellDepth,
                        krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                        outcome_resid = resids,
                        propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001),
                        lambda = 10, 
                        smoothers = smoothers, 
                        cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                        kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                        trt_bounds = depth_range,
                        threshold_val = log(5), 
                        clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                        clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                        surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                        loss_type = loss_type,
                        method = "L-BFGS-B", 
                        control = list(maxit = 60, trace = 3))
    
    params <- sub_result$par
    
    # 3. Check for convergence
    change <- sqrt(sum((params_old - params)^2))
    cat(sprintf("Iter: %d, Change: %f, Objective: %f\n", k, change, sub_result$value))
    
    if (change < tol) {
      cat("--- DC Algorithm Converged ---\n")
      params_old <- params
      break
    }
    
    params_old <- params
  }
```


I think the IPW case just does not work

```{r}
# Some not when implement thr IPW case
# In "IPW" case: 
# When setting lambda = 0, At iterate     0  f=      -1.9501  |proj g|=       1.4006 when gr is defined, 
# At X0, 0 variables are exactly at the bounds At iterate     0  f=      -1.9501  |proj g|=       1.7171 when gr is not defined
# 
# 
# 
# It returns: At iterate     0  f=      -38.499  |proj g|=       2.3897, without specifying gr.
# But it returns At iterate     0  f=      -38.499  |proj g|=       1.3454, so there might be issue with the derivative
```

```{r}
# I think the initial looks too crazy
plot(params_initial_glmnet, params)
```



```{r}
cat('RKHS loss:')
sum(compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = k_matrix %*% params_old,
                         subject_idx = 1:nrow(k_matrix),
                         T = data$logWellDepth,
                         krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                         outcome_resid = resids,
                         propensity_est = gps_est,
                         cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                         trt_bounds = depth_range,
                         kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                         threshold_val = threshold_val, 
                         clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                         surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                         loss_type = "or"))
cat('\n')
cat('parametric loss:')
sum(compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = indirect_policy_DB,
                         subject_idx = 1:nrow(k_matrix),
                         T = data$logWellDepth,
                         krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                         outcome_resid = resids,
                         propensity_est = gps_est,
                         cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                         trt_bounds = depth_range,
                         kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                         threshold_val = threshold_val, 
                         clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                         surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                         loss_type = "or"))
cat('\n')
```


```{r}
Metrics::accuracy(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_old)  > data$logWellDepth)
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor(as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_old > data$logWellDepth)))
```

```{r}
Metrics::accuracy(log(data_test$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, as.numeric(k_matrix_test%*% params_old  > data_test$logWellDepth))
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data_test$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor(as.vector(k_matrix_test %*% params_old  > data_test$logWellDepth)))
```


```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_nonsp_test,  k_matrix_test %*% params_old)
plot(indirect_policy_nonsp,  k_matrix %*% params_old)
```


##### Let's use a 20 x 20 kernel to do a small test

```{r}
# we use the following one for now
kernel_design_matrix <- model.matrix(~ . , data = cbind(data[, GPS_covariate_names], U = krige_values_RKHS))[,-1]
kernel_design_matrix <- scale(kernel_design_matrix)
```

get different types of indirect method: OR based

```{r}
indirect_policy_RKHS <- sapply(1:nrow(data), function(i) {
  # if lower bound can alreay be lower than the threshold (satisfy the ES), we have to use lower bound
  if(smoothers_RKHS[[i]](depth_range[1]) + krige_values_RKHS[i] <= threshold_val) return(depth_range[1])
  # if even upper bound can not be lower than the threshold, we have to use upper bound
  if(smoothers_RKHS[[i]](depth_range[2]) + krige_values_RKHS[i] > threshold_val) return(depth_range[2])
  res <- uniroot(f = function(t) {smoothers_RKHS[[i]](t) + krige_values_RKHS[i] - threshold_val},
        lower = depth_range[1],
        upper = depth_range[2])
  return(res$root)
})
```

get different types of indirect method: DB based

```{r}
resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(svm_auto, newdata = design_matrix) - krige_values_RKHS
scaled_resids <- resids * weights_cbps$weights
# plot(scaled_resids)
kernel_bw <- 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5)
```

```{r}
indirect_policy_DB <- sapply(1:nrow(data), function(i) {
  # if lower bound can alreay be lower than the threshold (satisfy the ES), we have to use lower bound
  if(smoothers_RKHS[[i]](depth_range[1]) + krige_values_RKHS[i] + scaled_resids[i] * gaussian_kernel(depth_range[1], data$logWellDepth[i], sigma = kernel_bw) <= threshold_val) return(depth_range[1])
  # if even upper bound can not be lower than the threshold, we have to use upper bound
  if(smoothers_RKHS[[i]](depth_range[2]) + krige_values_RKHS[i] + scaled_resids[i] * gaussian_kernel(depth_range[2], data$logWellDepth[i], sigma = kernel_bw)> threshold_val) return(depth_range[2])
  res <- uniroot(f = function(t) {smoothers_RKHS[[i]](t) + krige_values_RKHS[i] + scaled_resids[i] * gaussian_kernel(t, data$logWellDepth[i], sigma = kernel_bw)- threshold_val},
        lower = depth_range[1],
        upper = depth_range[2])
  return(res$root)
})
```

check that the DB and OR indirect minimize the corresponding loss function

get the subset (sample size 20) for test

```{r}
set.seed(1998)
sub_indices <- sample(nrow(kernel_design_matrix), 20)
kernel_design_matrix_small <- kernel_design_matrix[sub_indices,]
indirect_policy_DB_small <- indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices]
indirect_policy_RKHS_small <- indirect_policy_RKHS[sub_indices]
```

```{r}
m <- 0
gamma <- 2^(m) * median(rdist(kernel_design_matrix_small))
rbf <- rbfdot(sigma = 1/(gamma^2))
k_matrix <- kernelMatrix(rbf, kernel_design_matrix_small)
k_matrix <- cbind(rep(1,20), k_matrix)
```

```{r}
hist(k_matrix)
```


```{r}
initial_glmnet <- glmnet(x = k_matrix[,-1], y = indirect_policy_DB_small, alpha = 0, lambda = 0)
params_initial_glmnet <- coef(initial_glmnet)
params_initial_glmnet <- as.numeric(params_initial_glmnet)
```

```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_DB_small, as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_glmnet), main = "initialize: indirect v.s. indirect DB")
Metrics::rmse(indirect_policy_DB_small, as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_glmnet))
summary(indirect_policy_DB_small - as.vector(k_matrix %*% params_initial_glmnet))
summary(indirect_policy_DB_small)
hist(params_initial_glmnet, main = "histogram of cvglmnet initialize")
```

```{r}

direct_optim_trt <- optim(par = cbind(rep(1,20),diag(20)) %*% params_initial_glmnet,
      fn = compute_total_loss_sum_smooth,
      subject_idx = 1:20,
      T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
      krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
      outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
      propensity_est = rep(1,20),
      cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
      trt_bounds = depth_range,
      threshold_val = log(5), 
      kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
      clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
      surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
      loss_type = "or",
      method = "L-BFGS-B", 
      control = list(maxit = 60, trace =4))

```
```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_RKHS_small - direct_optim_trt$par)
```

```{r}
compute_total_loss_sum_smooth(assigned_trt = direct_optim_trt$par,
                              subject_idx = 1:20,
                              T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
                              krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
                              outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
                              propensity_est = rep(1,20),
                              cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                              trt_bounds = depth_range,
                              threshold_val = log(5), 
                              kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                              clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                              surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                              loss_type = "or")
```

```{r}
# for (indice in sub_indices){
#   plot(seq(depth_range[1],depth_range[2],length.out = 200), sapply(seq(depth_range[1],depth_range[2],length.out = 200),function(t){smoothers[[indice]](t)}))
# }
for (i in 1:length(sub_indices)){
  indice <- sub_indices[i]
  plot(seq(depth_range[1],depth_range[2],length.out = 200), sapply(seq(depth_range[1],depth_range[2],length.out = 200),function(t){threshold_val*(t-depth_range[1])- cumint_smoothers[[indice]](t)}), xlim = c(0,10), ylim = c(-3,3))
  lines(seq(depth_range[1],depth_range[2],length.out = 200), sapply(seq(depth_range[1],depth_range[2],length.out = 200),function(t){compute_total_loss_sum_smooth(assigned_trt = t,
                              subject_idx = i,
                              T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
                              krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
                              outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
                              propensity_est = rep(1,20),
                              cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                              trt_bounds = depth_range,
                              threshold_val = log(5), 
                              kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                              clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                              surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                              loss_type = "or")}), xlim = c(0,10),ylim = c(-3,3),col = 'grey')
  abline(v = direct_optim_trt$par[i],col='blue')
  abline(v = indirect_policy_RKHS_small[i],col='green')
}

```


! Try one sample loss function optimization.

```{r}
surrogate_type <- "Gaussian"

# loss_type <- "ipw"
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median
# krige_adjust <- rep(0, nrow(data))

loss_type <- 'or'
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(svm_auto, newdata = design_matrix) - krige_values_RKHS
# krige_adjust <- krige_values_RKHS

# loss_type <- 'db'
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(svm_auto, newdata = design_matrix) - krige_values_RKHS
# krige_adjust <- krige_values_RKHS

# smoothers <- smoothers_RKHS
# cumint_smoothers <- cumint_smoothers_RKHS

direct_optim <- optim(#par = params_initial_glmnet, 
                      par =  c(mean(indirect_policy_DB_small), indirect_policy_DB_small - mean(indirect_policy_DB_small)),
                      fn = compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS, # when doing this, I think it fails to calculate the derivative numerically by optim
                      gr = d_compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS,
                      K = cbind(rep(1,20),diag(20)), 
                      T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
                      krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
                      outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
                      propensity_est = rep(1,20),
                      lambda = 0, 
                      smoothers = smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                      cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                      kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                      trt_bounds = depth_range,
                      threshold_val = log(5), 
                      clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                      surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                      loss_type = loss_type,
                      method = "L-BFGS-B",  # Try one sample loss function optimization. 
                      # method = "Nelder-Mead", # try non-gradient
                      control = list(maxit = 60, trace = 5))
```

```{r}
cauchy_x <- c(1.42474, 1.89435, -0.600596, -1.03981, -1.15887, -0.599502, 
              -0.958252, -0.343123, -1.1015, -0.623741, -0.658636, 
              -1.10584, 1.97502, -0.861156, 0.0160609, -0.529284, 
              0.519484, 1.9086, -0.870035, 0.046277, 1.13534)
```

```{r}
compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS(params = cauchy_x,
                                   K = cbind(rep(1,20),diag(20)), 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
                                    krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
                                    outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
                                    propensity_est = rep(1,20),
                                    lambda = 0, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(5), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)
```

Is it the problem with cumint_smoothers?

```{r}
compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS(params = direct_optim$par,
                                   K = cbind(rep(1,20),diag(20)), 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
                                    krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
                                    outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
                                    propensity_est = rep(1,20),
                                    lambda = 0, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(5), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)

compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS(params = c(mean(indirect_policy_DB_small), indirect_policy_DB_small - mean(indirect_policy_DB_small)),
                                   K = cbind(rep(1,20),diag(20)), 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
                                    krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
                                    outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
                                    propensity_est = rep(1,20),
                                    lambda = 0, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(5), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)

compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS(params = c(mean(indirect_policy_RKHS_small), indirect_policy_RKHS_small - mean(indirect_policy_RKHS_small)),
                                   K = cbind(rep(1,20),diag(20)), 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
                                    krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
                                    outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
                                    propensity_est = rep(1,20),
                                    lambda = 0, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(5), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)
```


```{r}
plot(c(mean(indirect_policy_DB_small), indirect_policy_DB_small - mean(indirect_policy_DB_small)), c(mean(indirect_policy_RKHS_small), indirect_policy_RKHS_small - mean(indirect_policy_RKHS_small)))
```


```{r}
max_iter <- 50
tol <- 1e-4
clip_epsilon_bar <- 300
clip_epsilon <- 1
kernel_bw <- 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5)
depth_range <- c(min(data$logWellDepth), max(data$logWellDepth))

surrogate_type <- "Gaussian"

loss_type <- 'or'
krige_adjust <- krige_values_RKHS


params_old <- params_initial_glmnet
params <- params_initial_glmnet

smoothers <- smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices]
cumint_smoothers <- cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices]
threshold_val <- log(5)

par_initial <- c(mean(indirect_policy_DB_small), indirect_policy_DB_small - mean(indirect_policy_DB_small)) + runif(21,-0.5,0.5)

for (k in 1:max_iter) {
    
    # Solve the convex subproblem
    cat(k,'-th iteration of DC algorithm','\n')
    sub_result <- optim(par = par_initial, 
                        fn = compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, 
                        # gr = d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, # we try the case with/without gr
                        params_old = par_initial + 0.1, 
                        K = cbind(rep(1,20),diag(20)), 
                        T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
                        krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
                        outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
                        propensity_est = rep(1,20),
                        lambda = 0, 
                        smoothers = smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                        cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                        kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                        trt_bounds = depth_range,
                        threshold_val = log(5), 
                        clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                        clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                        surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                        loss_type = loss_type,
                        method = "L-BFGS-B", 
                        control = list(maxit = 60, trace = 3))
    
    params <- sub_result$par
    
    # 3. Check for convergence
    change <- sqrt(sum((params_old - params)^2))
    cat(sprintf("Iter: %d, Change: %f, Objective: %f\n", k, change, sub_result$value))
    
    if (change < tol) {
      cat("--- DC Algorithm Converged ---\n")
      params_old <- params
      break
    }
    
    params_old <- params
  }
```

```{r}
plot(params_old, par_initial)
```


```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_DB_small,cbind(rep(1,20),diag(20)) %*% params_old)
```

```{r}
compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS(params = params_old,
                                   K = cbind(rep(1,20),diag(20)), 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
                                    krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
                                    outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
                                    propensity_est = rep(1,20),
                                    lambda = 0, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(5), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)

compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS(params = c(mean(indirect_policy_DB_small), indirect_policy_DB_small - mean(indirect_policy_DB_small)),
                                   K = cbind(rep(1,20),diag(20)), 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth[sub_indices],
                                    krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS[sub_indices],
                                    outcome_resid = rep(0,20),
                                    propensity_est = rep(1,20),
                                    lambda = 0, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS[sub_indices], 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(5), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)
```


##### if we set grand matrix as identity matrix, it should return the indirect method


```{r}
surrogate_type <- "Gaussian"

# loss_type <- "ipw"
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median
# krige_adjust <- rep(0, nrow(data))

loss_type <- 'or'
resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(svm_auto, newdata = design_matrix) - krige_values_RKHS
krige_adjust <- krige_values_RKHS

# loss_type <- 'db'
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(svm_auto, newdata = design_matrix) - krige_values_RKHS
# krige_adjust <- krige_values_RKHS

smoothers <- smoothers_RKHS
cumint_smoothers <- cumint_smoothers_RKHS

direct_optim <- optim(par = params_initial_glmnet, 
                      fn = compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS, 
                      gr = d_compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS, 
                      K = cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))), 
                      T = data$logWellDepth,
                      krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                      outcome_resid = resids,
                      propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001),
                      lambda = 0, 
                      smoothers = smoothers, 
                      cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                      kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                      trt_bounds = depth_range,
                      threshold_val = log(5), 
                      clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                      surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                      loss_type = loss_type,
                      method = "L-BFGS-B", 
                      control = list(maxit = 60, trace = 4))
```

```{r}
3744 * compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS(params = direct_optim$par,
                                   K = cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))),
                                   T = data$logWellDepth,
                                    krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                                    outcome_resid = resids,
                                    propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001),
                                    lambda = 0, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers, 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(5), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)

3744 * compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS(params = c(mean(indirect_policy_DB), indirect_policy_DB - mean(indirect_policy_DB)),
                                   K = cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))),
                                   T = data$logWellDepth,
                                    krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                                    outcome_resid = resids,
                                    propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001),
                                    lambda = 0, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers, 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(5), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)

d_compute_total_loss_smooth_RKHS(params = c(mean(indirect_policy_DB), indirect_policy_DB - mean(indirect_policy_DB)),
                                 K = cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))),
                                 T = data$logWellDepth,
                                  krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                                  outcome_resid = resids,
                                  propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001),
                                  lambda = 0, 
                                  smoothers = smoothers, 
                                  cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                                  kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                  trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                  threshold_val = log(5), 
                                  clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                  surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                  loss_type = loss_type)
```


```{r}
cat('RKHS loss:')
sum(compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))) %*% direct_optim$par,
                         subject_idx = 1:nrow(k_matrix),
                         T = data$logWellDepth,
                         krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                         outcome_resid = resids,
                         propensity_est = gps_est,
                         cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                         trt_bounds = depth_range,
                         kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                         threshold_val = threshold_val, 
                         clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                         surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                         loss_type = "or"))
cat('\n')
cat('parametric loss:')
sum(compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = indirect_policy_DB,
                         subject_idx = 1:nrow(k_matrix),
                         T = data$logWellDepth,
                         krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                         outcome_resid = resids,
                         propensity_est = gps_est,
                         cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                         trt_bounds = depth_range,
                         kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                         threshold_val = threshold_val, 
                         clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                         surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                         loss_type = "or"))
cat('\n')
```

```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_DB, cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))) %*% direct_optim$par)
```

```{r}
Metrics::accuracy(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, as.vector(cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))) %*% direct_optim$par)  > data$logWellDepth)
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor(as.vector(cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))) %*% direct_optim$par > data$logWellDepth)))
```

```{r}
max_iter <- 50
tol <- 1e-4
clip_epsilon_bar <- 300
clip_epsilon <- 1
kernel_bw <- 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5)
depth_range <- c(min(data$logWellDepth), max(data$logWellDepth))

surrogate_type <- "Gaussian"

# loss_type <- "ipw"
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median
# krige_adjust <- rep(0, nrow(data))

loss_type <- 'or'
resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(svm_auto, newdata = design_matrix) - krige_values_RKHS
krige_adjust <- krige_values_RKHS

# loss_type <- 'db'
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(svm_auto, newdata = design_matrix) - krige_values_RKHS
# krige_adjust <- krige_values_RKHS


gps_est <- dnorm(data$logWellDepth, mean = gps_mean_model$SL.predict, sd = gps_sigma)

params_old <- params_initial_glmnet
params <- params_initial_glmnet

smoothers <- smoothers_RKHS
cumint_smoothers <- cumint_smoothers_RKHS
threshold_val <- log(5)

for (k in 1:max_iter) {
    
    # Solve the convex subproblem
    cat(k,'-th iteration of DC algorithm','\n')
    sub_result <- optim(par = params_old, 
                        fn = compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, 
                        gr = d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, # we try the case with/without gr
                        params_old = params_old, 
                        K = cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))), 
                        T = data$logWellDepth,
                        krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                        outcome_resid = resids,
                        propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001),
                        lambda = 0, 
                        smoothers = smoothers, 
                        cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                        kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                        trt_bounds = depth_range,
                        threshold_val = log(5), 
                        clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                        clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                        surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                        loss_type = loss_type,
                        method = "L-BFGS-B", 
                        control = list(maxit = 60, trace = 3))
    
    params <- sub_result$par
    
    # 3. Check for convergence
    change <- sqrt(sum((params_old - params)^2))
    cat(sprintf("Iter: %d, Change: %f, Objective: %f\n", k, change, sub_result$value))
    
    if (change < tol) {
      cat("--- DC Algorithm Converged ---\n")
      params_old <- params
      break
    }
    
    params_old <- params
  }
```

```{r}
cat('RKHS loss:')
sum(compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))) %*% params_old,
                         subject_idx = 1:nrow(k_matrix),
                         T = data$logWellDepth,
                         krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                         outcome_resid = resids,
                         propensity_est = gps_est,
                         cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                         trt_bounds = depth_range,
                         kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                         threshold_val = threshold_val, 
                         clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                         surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                         loss_type = "or"))
cat('\n')
cat('parametric loss:')
sum(compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = indirect_policy_DB,
                         subject_idx = 1:nrow(k_matrix),
                         T = data$logWellDepth,
                         krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                         outcome_resid = resids,
                         propensity_est = gps_est,
                         cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                         trt_bounds = depth_range,
                         kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                         threshold_val = threshold_val, 
                         clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                         surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                         loss_type = "or"))
cat('\n')
```

```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_DB, cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))) %*% params_old)
```
```{r}
Metrics::accuracy(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val, as.vector(cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))) %*% params_old)  > data$logWellDepth)
yardstick::mcc_vec(truth = as.factor(log(data$concentration_plus_median) > threshold_val), estimate = as.factor(as.vector(cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))) %*% params_old > data$logWellDepth)))
```


#### Visualize and Test the Loss functions

##### Test DC gradient

###### Test the parametric case


```{r}
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median
# loss_type <- 'ipw'
# krige_adjust <- rep(0, nrow(data))

# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(OR_mean_model_xgboost, design_matrix) - krige_values
# loss_type <- 'or'
# krige_adjust <- krige_values

resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(OR_mean_model_xgboost, design_matrix) - krige_values
loss_type <- 'db'
krige_adjust <- krige_values


params_old <- runif(ncol(design_matrix) ,min = -20, max = 50)
```

```{r}
# subset_indice <- c(1,2)
subset_indice <- 1:nrow(data)
# resids <- data$logconcentration_plus_median - predict(OR_mean_model_xgboost, design_matrix) - krige_values
# loss_type <- 'or'
# krige_adjust <- krige_values



d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(params = params_old * 1.1, 
                                    params_old = params_old, 
                                    K = design_matrix[subset_indice,], 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth[subset_indice],
                                    krige_adjust = krige_adjust[subset_indice],
                                    outcome_resid = resids[subset_indice],
                                    propensity_est = pmax(gps_est[subset_indice],0.001),
                                    lambda = 0, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers[subset_indice], 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers[subset_indice], 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(10), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)
```
```{r}
grad(func = function(params){
  compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(params = params, 
                                    params_old = params_old, 
                                    K = design_matrix[subset_indice,], 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth[subset_indice],
                                    krige_adjust = krige_adjust[subset_indice],
                                    outcome_resid = resids[subset_indice],
                                    propensity_est = pmax(gps_est[subset_indice],0.001),
                                    lambda = 0, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers, 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(10), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)},
  x = params_old * 1.1)
```

When the value goes wild they are totally different, so the derivative might be wrong outside the depth_range
Let's see what happens

```{r}
params = params_old * 1.1
params_old = params_old
K = design_matrix[subset_indice,]
T = data$logWellDepth[subset_indice]
krige_adjust = krige_adjust[subset_indice]
outcome_resid = resids[subset_indice]
propensity_est = pmax(gps_est[subset_indice],0.001)
lambda = 0
smoothers = smoothers[subset_indice]
cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers[subset_indice]
kernel_bw = kernel_bw
trt_bounds = depth_range
threshold_val = log(10)
clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon
clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar
```

```{r}
n <- nrow(K)
  
assigned_trt <- as.vector(K %*% params)

assigned_trt_old <- as.vector(K %*% params_old)

d_total_loss_plus <- d_compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt,
                                                      subject_idx = 1:n,
                                                      T = T,
                                                      krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                                                      outcome_resid = outcome_resid,
                                                      propensity_est = propensity_est,
                                                      smoothers = smoothers,
                                                      trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                                                      threshold_val = threshold_val,
                                                      kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                      clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                      clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                                      surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                                      loss_type = loss_type) 

d_total_loss_minus_old <- d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old,
                                                          subject_idx = 1:n,
                                                          T = T,
                                                          krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                                                          outcome_resid = outcome_resid,
                                                          propensity_est = propensity_est,
                                                          smoothers = smoothers,
                                                          trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                                                          threshold_val = threshold_val,
                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                                          surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                                          loss_type = loss_type)

if(lambda == 0){
  penalty <- rep(0, ncol(K))
} else {
  if(ncol(K) < nrow(K)){
    penalty <- c(0, (1/n) * lambda * as.vector(params[-1]))  
  }
  else {
    penalty <- c(0, (1/n) * lambda * as.vector(K[,-1] %*% params[-1]))  
  }
}

d_total_loss_dc_approx <- as.numeric(t(K) %*% (d_total_loss_plus - d_total_loss_minus_old))/n + penalty
```

```{r}
d_total_loss_dc_approx
```
```{r}
grad(func = compute_total_loss_smooth_plus, x = assigned_trt,
                                                      subject_idx = 1:n,
                                                      T = T,
                                                      krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                                                      outcome_resid = outcome_resid,
                                                      propensity_est = propensity_est,
                                                      cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                                                      trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                                                      threshold_val = threshold_val,
                                                      kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                      clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                      clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                                      surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                                      loss_type = loss_type)
```



###### Test RKHS case

```{r}
params = params_initial * 1.1
params_old = params_initial
K = k_matrix
T = data$logWellDepth
krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data))
outcome_resid = resids
propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001)
lambda = 10
smoothers = smoothers
cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers
kernel_bw = kernel_bw
trt_bounds = depth_range
threshold_val = log(10)
clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon
clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar
surrogate_type = surrogate_type
loss_type = loss_type
```

```{r}
assigned_trt <- as.vector(K %*% params)
  
assigned_trt_old <- as.vector(K %*% params_old)
```

```{r}
subject_idx <- 1
```

```{r}
# compute with grad

a = grad(func = function(params){
  total_loss_plus <- compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt[subject_idx],
                                                    subject_idx = subject_idx,
                                                    T = T,
                                                    krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                                                    outcome_resid = outcome_resid,
                                                    propensity_est = propensity_est,
                                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                                                    trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                                                    threshold_val = threshold_val,
                                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                    clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                                    loss_type = loss_type) 
  d_total_loss_minus_old <- d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old[subject_idx],
                                                              subject_idx = subject_idx,
                                                              T = T,
                                                              krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                                                              outcome_resid = outcome_resid,
                                                              propensity_est = propensity_est,
                                                              smoothers = smoothers,
                                                              trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                                                              threshold_val = threshold_val,
                                                              kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                              clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                              clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                                              surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                                              loss_type = loss_type)
  return(mean(total_loss_plus - d_total_loss_minus_old * assigned_trt[subject_idx]))},
  x = params
  )
```


##### DC approx loss function

```{r}
compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(params = params_old * 1.1, 
                                    params_old = params_old, 
                                    K = k_matrix, 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth,
                                    krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)),
                                    outcome_resid = resids,
                                    propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001),
                                    lambda = 10, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers, 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(10), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)
```

```{r}
# This is too slow and cannot be implemented
grad(func = compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, x = params_old * 1.1, params_old = params_old, 
                                    K = k_matrix, 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth,
                                    krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)),
                                    outcome_resid = resids,
                                    propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001),
                                    lambda = 10, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers, 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(10), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)
```

```{r}
d = d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(params = params_old * 1.1, 
                                    params_old = params_old, 
                                    K = k_matrix, 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth,
                                    krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)),
                                    outcome_resid = resids,
                                    propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001),
                                    lambda = 10, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers, 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(10), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)
```


```{r}
surrogate_type = "Gaussian"
loss_type = "ipw"

i <- 10
clip_epsilon_bar <- 200

clip_epsilon <- 10
threshold_val <- log(10)

knots <-  seq(depth_range[1] - 2, depth_range[2] + 2, length.out = 100)

kernel_bw <- 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5)
depth_range <- c(min(data$logWellDepth), max(data$logWellDepth))


total_loss_plus <- compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt,
                                                    subject_idx = 1:n,
                                                    T = T,
                                                    krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                                                    outcome_resid = outcome_resid,
                                                    propensity_est = propensity_est,
                                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                                                    trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                                                    threshold_val = threshold_val,
                                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                    clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                                    loss_type = loss_type) 
  
  
d_total_loss_minus_old <- d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old,
                                                              subject_idx = 1:n,
                                                              T = T,
                                                              krige_adjust = krige_adjust,
                                                              outcome_resid = outcome_resid,
                                                              propensity_est = propensity_est,
                                                              smoothers = smoothers,
                                                              trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                                                              threshold_val = threshold_val,
                                                              kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                              clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                              clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                                              surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                                              loss_type = loss_type)
  
total_loss_plus - d_total_loss_minus_old * assigned_trt
```

##### Loss function

```{r}
surrogate_type = "Gaussian"
loss_type = "ipw"
i <- 2
clip_epsilon_bar <- 200
clip_epsilon <- 10
threshold_val <- log(10)

knots <-  seq(depth_range[1] - 2, depth_range[2] + 2, length.out = 100)

kernel_bw <- 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5)
depth_range <- c(min(data$logWellDepth), max(data$logWellDepth))

surrogate_type <- "Gaussian"

loss_type <- "ipw"

plot(knots, sapply(knots, compute_total_loss_smooth,  subject_idx = i,
                            T = data$logWellDepth,
                            krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)),
                            outcome_resid = data$logconcentration_plus_median,
                            propensity_est = gps_est,
                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                            trt_bounds = depth_range,
                            threshold_val = threshold_val,
                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                            clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                            surrogate_type,
                            loss_type))

plot(knots, sapply(knots, compute_total_loss_smooth_plus,  subject_idx = i,
                            T = data$logWellDepth,
                            krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)),
                            outcome_resid = data$logconcentration_plus_median,
                            propensity_est = gps_est,
                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                            trt_bounds = depth_range,
                            threshold_val = threshold_val,
                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                            clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                            clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                            surrogate_type,
                            loss_type))

plot(knots, sapply(knots, compute_total_loss_smooth_minus,  subject_idx = i,
                             T = data$logWellDepth,
                            krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)),
                            outcome_resid = data$logconcentration_plus_median,
                            propensity_est = gps_est,
                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                            trt_bounds = depth_range,
                            threshold_val = threshold_val,
                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                            clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                            clip_epsilon_bar,
                            surrogate_type,
                            loss_type))

plot(knots, sapply(knots, compute_total_loss_smooth_plus,  subject_idx = i,
                             T = data$logWellDepth,
                            krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)),
                            outcome_resid = data$logconcentration_plus_median,
                            propensity_est = gps_est,
                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                            trt_bounds = depth_range,
                            threshold_val = threshold_val,
                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                            clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                            clip_epsilon_bar,
                            surrogate_type,
                            loss_type) - sapply(knots, compute_total_loss_smooth_minus,  subject_idx = i,
                             T = data$logWellDepth,
                            krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)),
                            outcome_resid = data$logconcentration_plus_median,
                            propensity_est = gps_est,
                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                            trt_bounds = depth_range,
                            threshold_val = threshold_val,
                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                            clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                            clip_epsilon_bar,
                            surrogate_type,
                            loss_type))

```



##### Visualize loss function

```{r}
surrogate_type = "Gaussian"
loss_type = "ipw"
i = 10
clip_epsilon_bar = 50
knots <- seq(-6, 6, length.out = 100)

plot(knots, sapply(knots, compute_total_loss_smooth,  subject_idx = i,
                            T = data$T,
                            krige_adjust = krige_values,
                            outcome_resid = data$Y,
                            propensity_est = gps_est,
                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                            trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                            threshold_val = threshold_val,
                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                            clip_epsilon = 1,
                            surrogate_type,
                            loss_type))

plot(knots, sapply(knots, compute_total_loss_smooth_plus,  subject_idx = i,
                             T = data$T,
                            krige_adjust = krige_values,
                            outcome_resid = data$Y,
                            propensity_est = gps_est,
                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                            trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                            threshold_val = threshold_val,
                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                            clip_epsilon = 1,
                            clip_epsilon_bar,
                            surrogate_type,
                            loss_type))

plot(knots, sapply(knots, compute_total_loss_smooth_minus,  subject_idx = i,
                             T = data$T,
                            krige_adjust = krige_values,
                            outcome_resid = data$Y,
                            propensity_est = gps_est,
                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                            trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                            threshold_val = threshold_val,
                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                            clip_epsilon = 1,
                            clip_epsilon_bar,
                            surrogate_type,
                            loss_type))

plot(knots, sapply(knots, compute_total_loss_smooth_plus,  subject_idx = i,
                             T = data$T,
                            krige_adjust = krige_values,
                            outcome_resid = data$Y,
                            propensity_est = gps_est,
                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                            trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                            threshold_val = threshold_val,
                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                            clip_epsilon = 1,
                            clip_epsilon_bar,
                            surrogate_type,
                            loss_type) - sapply(knots, compute_total_loss_smooth_minus,  subject_idx = i,
                             T = data$T,
                            krige_adjust = krige_values,
                            outcome_resid = data$Y,
                            propensity_est = gps_est,
                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                            trt_bounds = trt_bounds,
                            threshold_val = threshold_val,
                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                            clip_epsilon = 1,
                            clip_epsilon_bar,
                            surrogate_type,
                            loss_type))

```


##### Test Gradient of DC

```{r}
grad(func = compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, x = params_old * 1.1, params_old = params_old, 
                                    K = k_matrix, 
                                    T = data$logWellDepth,
                                    krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)),
                                    outcome_resid = resids,
                                    propensity_est = pmax(gps_est,0.001),
                                    lambda = 10, 
                                    smoothers = smoothers, 
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers, 
                                    kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(10), 
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    clip_epsilon_bar = clip_epsilon_bar,
                                    surrogate_type = surrogate_type,
                                    loss_type = loss_type)
```


```{r}

```


##### Test gradient os plus, minus

```{r}

knots <- seq(depth_range[1] - 20, depth_range[2] + 20, length.out = 200)
i <- 100

d1 <- sapply(knots, d_compute_total_loss_smooth_plus, subject_idx = i, T = data$logWellDepth, 
                   krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)), outcome_resid =  data$logconcentration_plus_median, 
                   propensity_est = gps_est,
                        smoothers = smoothers, 
                        
                        kernel_bw = 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5),
                        trt_bounds = depth_range,
                        threshold_val = log(10), 
                        clip_epsilon = 1,
                        clip_epsilon_bar = 400,
                        surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                        loss_type = "ipw")

plot(knots, d1)

d2 <- sapply(knots, function(assigned_trt){
  grad(func = compute_total_loss_smooth_plus, x = assigned_trt, subject_idx = i, T = data$logWellDepth, 
                  krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)), outcome_resid =  data$logconcentration_plus_median, 
                  propensity_est = gps_est, cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                  kernel_bw = 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5),
                  trt_bounds = depth_range,
                  threshold_val = log(10), 
                  clip_epsilon = 1,
                  clip_epsilon_bar = 400,
                  surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                  loss_type = "ipw")
})
  
plot(knots, d2)

                                           
```

```{r}
d1 - d2
```


```{r}

knots <- seq(depth_range[1] - 20, depth_range[2] + 20, length.out = 200)
i <- 1
d3 <- sapply(knots, d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus, subject_idx = i, T = data$logWellDepth, 
                   krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)), outcome_resid =  data$logconcentration_plus_median, 
                   propensity_est = gps_est,
                        smoothers = smoothers, 
                        
                        kernel_bw = 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5),
                        trt_bounds = depth_range,
                        threshold_val = log(10), 
                        clip_epsilon = 1,
                        clip_epsilon_bar = 400,
                        surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                        loss_type = "ipw")
plot(knots, d3)

d4 <- sapply(knots, function(assigned_trt){
  grad(func = compute_total_loss_smooth_minus, x = assigned_trt, subject_idx = i, T = data$logWellDepth, 
                  krige_adjust = rep(0, nrow(data)), outcome_resid =  data$logconcentration_plus_median, 
                  propensity_est = gps_est, cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                  kernel_bw = 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5),
                  trt_bounds = depth_range,
                  threshold_val = log(10), 
                  clip_epsilon = 1,
                  clip_epsilon_bar = 400,
                  surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                  loss_type = "ipw")
})

plot(knots, d4)

d3 - d4                                           
```


```{r}
grad(function(coefs){
  assigned_trt <- design_matrix %*% coefs
  return(sum(compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt,
                                 subject_idx = 1:nrow(data$X),
                                 T = data$T,
                                 krige_adjust = krige_values,
                                 outcome_resid = resids,
                                 propensity_est = gps_est,
                                 cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers,
                                 trt_bounds = c(-4, 4),
                                 threshold_val = threshold_val,
                                 kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                 clip_epsilon = 1,
                                 clip_epsilon_bar,
                                 surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                 loss_type = "db")))},
  x = coefs)
```
